criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on app stores (e.g., Google Play, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across all platforms.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI integration in the app's features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Quality and user-friendliness of the app's interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, design awards

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of the app's features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and improvements.
criteria.sources: App store update history, developer blogs

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: Level of privacy and security measures implemented in the app.
criteria.sources: App privacy policies, security audits, user reviews
